geography_priority: Houston (Harris, Fort Bend, Brazoria, Montgomery, Galveston)
primary_sources_attempted: Google business profile searches per metro
Local news / Autobody News press releases on TX shops
BBB TX collision shop accredited profiles
_meta.sourcing_notes: TX has NO mandatory professional licensing board for collision repair shops (TX DMV salvage license is per-vehicle, not per-shop; I-CAR Gold Class is voluntary). No state CSV exists. Spine was assembled from WebSearch + per-shop website verification with strict PE/MSO exclusion. Heavy filtering removed: Caliber, Crash Champions, Classic Collision, Joe Hudson, Gerber, ABRA, Maaco, CARSTAR (incl. Ambassador Collision Houston), Fix Auto, Quality Collision Group (acquired Hance's Uptown 2024-08 + Stuart's Paint & Body), Texan Collision Centers, Texas Collision Centers (consolidator), Dealership-affiliated shops (Cavender, McDavid, Park Place BodyWerks, Frank Kent, Group 1 Collision, Gillman, Toyota of Katy, Mercedes-Benz of Sugar Land, Northside Chevrolet, Honda of Tomball), Harvey's Collision (sold to Lennox 2018), Boerne Collision Center (OpenRoad/Trivest PE), AutoNation Collision, Heritage Auto Body (suspicious — verify). Cherry-picked from initial WebSearch yields and per-shop confirmation. Where info is thin (founder name, specific tenure), conservative defaults used and flagged in confidence.
exclusion_list_active: Crash Champions (PE Lone Star — Service King successor)

Cavender Collision Center (Cavender Auto dealership group)
Park Place BodyWerks (Park Place dealership group)
Frank Kent Body Shop (Frank Kent Honda/Acura dealership)
Harvey's Collision Centers (Lennox + McFadden — exited family in 2018)
Boerne Collision Center (OpenRoad / Trivest PE platform)
Heritage Auto Body Group (verify — possible roll-up)
Dealership-affiliated shops broadly (Toyota of Katy, Mercedes-Benz of Sugar Land, Northside Chevrolet, Honda of Tomball, MINI of the Woodlands, Wiesner Buick GMC, Gullo Toyota, etc.)
